title: Cat sun and moon
description: replaces the texture to the sun and moon to a cat
body:
Cat Sun and Moon Catsun for Minecraft
Cat Sun and Moon is a rp that makes cat themed sun n moon designs Whether you're watching the sunrise over your base or gazing at the moon during a midnight adventure, you'll be greeted by a cat face lighting up the sky.
This pack is perfect for players who want a touch of cats in their world, or anyone tired of the same classic textures. lightweight compatible with most setups, and adds a sun and cat moon

Enjoy day and nights  all under the watchful gaze of your pixelated cat companions.
